nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Production URL: https://[your-instance].app.n8n.cloud/webhook/vapi-rag-query — set this as the server URL in the search_knowledge_base tool definition in VAPI.

meta.description: Synchronous VAPI tool call handler for knowledge base search. Receives a query from VAPI, embeds it using OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, retrieves the top 4 matching chunks from Supabase pgvector, and returns formatted context back to VAPI for Claude to use in its response.
meta.notes: SETUP: Replace credential IDs. Webhook URL to configure in VAPI tool: https://[instance].app.n8n.cloud/webhook/vapi-rag-query. The Supabase Vector Store node needs 'retrieve-as-text' mode with query sourced from the Extract Tool Call output.
